tasks.name: implement-lint-fix-explicit-return-type-mcp
tasks.task:
Fix all @typescript-eslint/explicit-function-return-type violations in the following files:
- src/mcp/tools/askPermission.ts
- src/mcp/tools/knowledgeSearch.ts
- src/mcp/tools/tsAnalyze.ts
- src/mcp/tools/tsChecker.ts
- src/mcp/tools/tsGetReferences.ts
- src/mcp/tools/tsGetTypes.ts
- src/mcp/tools/tsTestStrategist.ts

Add explicit return type annotations to all functions and arrow functions that are missing them. Use mcp__perclst__ts_analyze to inspect each file's structure and mcp__perclst__ts_get_types to confirm correct types. After editing, run `./node_modules/.bin/eslint src/mcp/tools/` to verify no violations remain.

tasks.command: npm run build && npm run test:unit

tasks.name: implement-lint-fix-explicit-return-type-mcp
tasks.task: Return types added and build/tests passing. Commit the changes with an appropriate conventional commit message (e.g. fix(lint): add explicit return types to mcp/tools).
